EMERALDS · Day -1 · Summary
⚡ EMERALDS — Stoikov market maker on a pegged price
FV = 10,000 (fixed). Strategy posts passive quotes at bid 9992 / ask 10008 (+8 ticks each side) and takes any order that crosses FV.

Green flashes on price panel = ask < FV (free buy opportunity) — 0 ticks
Red flashes = bid > FV (free sell opportunity) — 0 ticks
Signal panel: bid/ask distance from FV (should sit at −8/+8; crossings = free edge) + market spread on secondary axis.
Algo action strip: gray = take opportunity, blue = making passive, orange = near limit.
